DEPT. 2, RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, JUDGE; V. T. INVENTADO, CLERK; M. NORMAN, CSR. 10:55 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL & DEFT APPEARED IN PROPIA PERSONA.
